auth.name: Name
auth.logout_confirm: Do you really want to sign out?

errors.email_exists: This email is already in use

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle_email: Enter your email, we'll send a 6-digit code.
forgot.subtitle_reset: Enter the code received and your new password.
forgot.email_sent_desc: A 6-digit code has been sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox (and spam folder). The code expires in 30 min.
forgot.email_failed_desc: The email could not be sent. Contact support.

mode.paper_desc: No real orders. Performance uses fictional capital.
mode.live_desc: The bot executes real orders on Binance. Limit: ${{cap}}/trade.
mode.confirm_live_msg: The bot will switch to REAL trading with REAL money on Binance.
mode.binance_required_msg: You must connect your Binance account before enabling Live mode.

killswitch.title: Kill-switch (pause buys)
killswitch.off_desc: Instantly disable new buys if needed.
killswitch.on_desc: No new buys. The bot ONLY closes open positions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.binance_connect_desc: Trade real with your own funds
profile.binance_manage: Real trading available · Tap to manage

premium.title: Premium
premium.lifetime_subtitle: Permanent access unlocked — no payment required 🚀
premium.cta_note: Secure payment via Stripe · Cancel anytime
premium.stripe_not_ready: Payment system not yet enabled on server.
premium.will_cancel: Your subscription will stop at the end of the current period.
premium.cancelled_msg: You keep Premium access until the end of the paid period.
premium.paid_pending_msg: Premium activation in progress… Usually takes 5 to 15 seconds.
premium.cancelled_payment_msg: No amount was charged. You can try again anytime.
premium.legal: No guarantee of gains. Crypto trading involves high risk. You can unsubscribe anytime from this screen.

binance.title: Binance Connection
binance.step_1: Sign in to Binance → Profile → API Management
binance.step_3:
Enable ONLY:
✅ Enable Spot & Margin Trading
binance.step_4:
You MUST DISABLE:
❌ Enable Withdrawals
❌ Enable Universal Transfer
binance.warn_withdrawals: Without the "Withdrawals" permission, no one can withdraw your funds — even if your keys were compromised.
binance.encryption_note: 🔒 Your keys are encrypted (AES-128) before being stored. No one — not even support — can read them in clear.
binance.next_step_desc: Go to the AI Bot tab and toggle "LIVE mode" so the bot executes real orders on Binance.
binance.limit_default: 💡 By default, the maximum size per trade is limited to $50 (configurable in bot settings).
binance.disconnect_msg: The bot will automatically revert to Paper mode. You can reconnect anytime.
